message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "index.jsp" as index_jsp
participant "basket.jsp" as basket_jsp
entity Order
control Pay
boundary LogicFacade
database Database

User -> index_jsp : user clicks "add to cart"
activate index_jsp
note right of User: We assume user\nis logged in
loop for each cupcake
    index_jsp ->> Order : AddToOrder()
end loop
deactivate index_jsp
return redirect (msg \"added to basket\") from index_jsp to User
User <- - display msg by index_jsp
User ->> index_jsp : user clicks "show basket"
activate index_jsp
index_jsp ->> basket_jsp : ShowBasket()
activate basket_jsp
basket_jsp ->> Pay : Pay()
Pay -->+ self : Check date
self -->>- Pay 
Pay <--+ self : Check if logged in
self --->>- Pay 
Pay <->+ self : Check balance
self <-->- Pay 

group save order process
    
  activate Pay
  
  	Pay->LogicFacade:saveOrder()\n  
		LogicFacade->Database:saves order\ndatabase.save(order)\norderMapper.insert(orders)	
			deactivate LogicFacade
		
	return return
	
		
	end group


' Return flow back through layers after saving completes successfully without errors/exceptions thrown anywhere along way including DB operations themselves failing silently due lack proper error
